title: Manchester City
description: Manchester City Yas Residences by Ohana brings a football-inspired branded living concept to Yas Island, Abu Dhabi—pairing strong lifestyle storytelling with island leisure, dining, and entertainment. The development targets investors and fans seeking a unique branded address with long-term hospitality and tourism demand nearby.

title: Greenz
description: Greenz (linked to Danube’s Sea City pipeline) focuses on attainable apartments with family-friendly payment options and community amenities—ideal for first-time buyers and yield-led investors in Dubai’s value corridor.

title: Golf Vale
description: Golf Vale by Emaar sits within Emaar South’s golf-facing master plan, offering contemporary villas and townhomes with green views, parks, and access to championship golf—built for end-users who want space and a credible long-term community story.

title: Valencia
description: Valencia is part of DAMAC Lagoons’ Mediterranean-themed clusters, known for lagoon-side living, townhouses, and strong visual differentiation. It appeals to investors who want thematic master-plan demand and competitive entry pricing relative to central Dubai.
